{{Infobox character
| name = First Director of the Magic Tower
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[First Director of the Magic Tower]] has three shadows behind him.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[First Director of the Magic Tower]] employed two guardian mages.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[First Director of the Magic Tower]] visited [[Dornoth]] Four last week.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
